title: ANC - 4.-ANC is ON and its value is either Adaptive or Standard and User doesn’t change value during call when Transparency is OFF without selected values
scenario: Verify ANC remains locked to its previous value and Transparency mode is disabled during an active call, with normal toggle behavior restored after the call ends.
steps: Start/join a call - ANC remains ON with previous selection, Transparency is greyed out.
Tap Transparency toggle - popup informs it's unavailable during call.
Leave call - ANC stays ON with previous value, Transparency stays OFF with no value.
After call, user can toggle between ANC and Transparency modes normally.
expected: When ANC is ON (set to Adaptive or Standard) and Transparency Mode is OFF with no value selected, the user should not be able to change the ANC value during a call.
